definitions: adj. 虚高的 (在此语境下指价格被不合理抬高)

examples.text: K) Putting an inflated price on artifacts rather than viewing them as cultural and historical treasures that transcend any price
examples.explanation: K) 将文物标上虚高的价格，而非将其视为超越任何价值的文化与历史瑰宝

reviewSessions.example_text: K) Putting an inflated price on artifacts rather than viewing them as cultural and historical treasures that transcend any price
expected_definitions: adj. 虚高的 (在此语境下指价格被不合理抬高)
reviewSessions.feedback: “高昂的”表达了价格很高，但未体现“不合理抬高、虚高”的含义。
